result.reason: Nightly build 1.77.2 introduced a bug where connection or configuration data might have duplicate field names during XML serialization or deserialization, leading to application errors or data inconsistencies. This likely stems from changes in ConnectionInfo properties or the associated XmlConnectionNodeSerializer.
result.approach: Investigate ConnectionInfo.cs for any newly added or modified properties that might conflict with existing serialized names (e.g., via XmlElementAttribute or XmlAttributeAttribute). Review XmlConnectionNodeSerializer28.cs to identify any manual serialization logic that could be generating duplicate XML element or attribute names during the serialization process. The fix will likely involve adjusting property names, XML serialization attributes, or the serialization logic to ensure uniqueness.
